protocol.weight_constraints_current: nonzero weights >=0.10, multiples of 0.05; leverage/gross can be high but MDD constraints dominate
protocol.strict_mdd: weighted intrabar adverse move and period-contained exits
protocol.trading_target_asset: BTC portfolio sleeves unless an entry explicitly says otherwise; external features do not change target asset.
